{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230111032A54D48157A06B36DC58"}"},"total":1500},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6826922545481220110","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实话 这个小说 我看得有六七遍了 我挺喜欢里面的剧情 有点拖 但确实挺好 可以看看 真不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1589516771,"group_id":"6488864900297788430","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4YPLcsqSauqFAaXheAeCEgnhlIjn66oOnM52wuCJUeH","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3724768055669629","user_name":"陶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3724768055669629","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6488864900297788430","book_info":{"abstract":"超级散仙陆风在第六次天劫的时候被最后一道天雷炸得血肉纷飞。灵魂靠着强大的修为境界奇迹般的飘散到了异世，进入了一个刚死的败落斗气家族少爷身上。
魔法在我面前算个鸟，本人除了会飞还会布阵。炼药师在我面前算个屁，本人除了炼丹还会炼法器。斗气在我面前算根葱，本人直接真气加法器。
美女是用来泡的，管你是祸国还是殃民。对手是用来踩的，管你是枭雄还是霸主。
看岳诚如何在这个斗气和魔法纵横的异世开创出一个修真全能横行的景象，充分发挥出见妞就泡，替天行道的真谛。（本故事穿越纯属虚构）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a0c6dc0647c34cacb9e6ffbfeae0e71f","author":"禹枫","author_id":"","book_id":"6488864900297788430","book_name":"修真者在异世","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383880","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8276人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6498635762232197645","read_count":"8276","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4463240"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"1158","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,异世大陆","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/6eda0002efff0753190f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383463&x-signature=4wKWMYzwLysCu%2FfW5yYn0L%2F5IjY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230111032A54D48157A06B36DC58"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":21,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7971,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7971,"reply_count":18,"show_pv":176624},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"695348071193
